data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of optional cap/base rate policy enforcement, but the evidence does not indicate that such a policy is implemented or enforced in the current saga. The linked use case explicitly mentions this requirement, yet there are no details or evidence showing that a cap or base rate policy is applied during the bidding process. This indicates a gap in the implementation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of optional cap/base rate policy enforcement in the bidding process.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
